title: Opus by AppliedAI — Automate Regulated Processes with AI
full_text:
Automate regulated business processes with AppliedAI.
Opus is the agentic AI platform that helps companies rewire
with AI fast. Business teams discover, build, run, and optimise
workflows directly — while IT stays in control. The result: a living Digital Twin of your automated enterprise.
Get a Demo
Watch Video
Trusted Worldwide
01
Discover the possibilities.
See what your processes are actually costing you — before you automate anything.
02
Build your workflows.
Watch agents rewire your process on an intelligent canvas. Your team refines. Opus builds.
03
Run your business.
Your business runs at full speed — powered by agents, guided by humans. Governance built in.
04
Optimise continuously.
Gets smarter. Gets cheaper. Every cycle — your advantage compounds.
“By adopting Opus, we are strengthening our ability to leverage data and AI responsibly to support clinicians, optimise operations and deliver high-quality care to our communities.”
David Hadley
Chief Executive Officer, NMC Healthcare
“Enterprises today don’t need more automation tools — they need outcomes. When you rebuild the workflow rather than bolt AI on top of it, the gains aren’t incremental — they’re transformational.”
Ritesh Idnani
CEO & Managing Director, Firstsource
93%
less provider-data processing time
10×
higher admissions throughput
90%
less manual processing effort
Read the release
Partnerships
AppliedAI and McKinsey partner to deliver agentic AI to regulated enterprises
AppliedAI and McKinsey & Company announce a collaboration to rewire mid- and back-office operations in regulated industries — bringing Opus together with McKinsey’s transformation expertise and QuantumBlack’s technical capabilities to take clients from strategy to live, governed workflow in weeks, not months.
Read the release
